holdings.infoBox: JPSE is an equity ETF with a total of 550 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 0.65%, Ultra Clean Holdings at 0.61%, Sterling Infrastructure at 0.61%, Sanmina at 0.54%, and Viavi Solutions at 0.53%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Diversified Return U.S. Small Cap Equity ETF (JPSE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a multi-factor index comprised of US small-cap stocks. The index uses a combination of fundamental and technical factors for stock selection, and inverse volatility for weighting. JPSE was launched on Nov 15, 2016 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
